items.headline: Palantir raises annual revenue forecast on strong US government demand
items.summary: Palantir Technologies raised its annual revenue forecast on Monday and beat estimates for quarterly results, a sign of rising ‌demand for its data analytics software from the U.S. government and ‌commercial clients.  The growing use of artificial intelligence tools in modern warfare has boosted demand for ​software platforms developed by companies such as Palantir that help defense departments analyze data and make real-time targeting decisions.  Palantir now expects fiscal 2026 revenue to be between $7.65 billion and $7.66 billion, compared with its prior expectations of $7.18 billion to $7.20 billion.
